name: Whoopi Goldberg
blurb: A pioneering solo performer, she co-hosted HBOs Comic Relief benefit specials and later became an EGOT winner.
bio: Whoopi Goldberg is an American comedian, actress and television host who broke through with her one-woman Broadway show, taped by HBO as Direct from Broadway, which won the Grammy for Best Comedy Album and made her the first Black woman to win that award. A pioneering solo performer, she co-hosted HBOs Comic Relief benefit specials and later became an EGOT winner.

timeline.ev: Creates one-woman show The Spook Show
HBO taping Whoopi Goldberg: Direct from Broadway

accolades: Grammy Award for Best Comedy Album (Direct from Broadway)
First Black woman to win the Grammy for Best Comedy Album

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Only one embeddable official STAND-UP clip located: her 2009 Just For Laughs Montreal gala set (Just For Laughs official channel) — which matches her logged 'Just For Laughs(2009,tv)' appearance. Whoopi's iconic stage work predates the official-YouTube era and is unavailable as embeddable official uploads: 'Direct from Broadway'(1985,HBO) and 'Fontaine... Why Am I Straight?'(1988,HBO) exist on YouTube ONLY as fan/VHS-rip re-uploads (e.g. ZYXWV-style and personal channels) or as embed-disabled uploads (oembed returns 'Unauthorized'/'Forbidden'/'Not Found'). The Comic Relief VI clip is a fan channel ('THE LAUGH LABB'); the '90s Stand Up' compilation is a fan channel ('Comedy Gaff'). Her own channel WhoopiTube and The Howard Stern Show host Moms-Mabley-related material but those are interviews/documentary, not stand-up. Below the 3-clip minimum: honest gap. IG verified official (@whoopigoldberg, 200). Website whoopigoldberg.com resolves 200 but currently shows a 'fan site coming soon' placeholder, so omitted to avoid asserting it as an active official site.
